places.name: Palani — Murugan
places.modernInfo: One of 6 abodes of Murugan (Arupadaiveedu). 693 steps to the hilltop shrine or rope car. The idol made of rare herbs — Navapashanam.

scenes.title: Murugan renounces everything
scenes.description: When the sage Narada gave the mango of wisdom to Shiva, Shiva gave it to whoever could circumambulate the universe first. Kartikeya/Murugan raced around the cosmos, but Ganesh simply walked around his parents — the universe. Murugan, upset, renounced everything and went to Palani hill alone.

places.name: Saravana Poigai
places.modernInfo: The 6 sacred lakes (Saravana Poigai) where Kartikeya/Skanda was born from Shiva's third eye sparks that fell into the Ganga.

scenes.title: Skanda is born from Shiva's fire
scenes.description: The spark from Shiva's third eye was so powerful that even Agni and Ganga could not hold it. It fell into 6 reeds in 6 sacred lakes and was nursed by 6 Kritikas (Pleiades stars). Kartikeya was born with 6 heads — one for each mother.
